metadata.point_methods_use: point-estimate cp-control TaxiNet DNN events sampled from the point-estimate IPOMDP using modular realization strategy 'uniform'
metadata.conformal_method_uses: two-stage cp-control TaxiNet DNN events: point estimate sampled from the point-estimate IPOMDP using modular realization strategy 'uniform', then conformal set from conditional (true state, estimate) artifacts
